series_metadata.series_description: The Office Leases are executed leases for all BWC leased office space which includes the Service Offices, William Green Building, and Warehouse locations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Fulfill requirements of O.R.C. 117.49 Record of Land Titles. in Facilities Management two (2) years expiration of lease, and ; Electronic: Fulfill requirements of O.R.C. 117.49 Record of Land Titles. on I: Drive Facilities Management two (2) years expiration of lease, and
